final:
// // This module subtracts B from A when C is low (0), and adds A and B when C is high (1).
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input C,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(*) begin
    if (C == 0) begin
        out = A + B;
    end
    else begin
        out = A - B;
    end
end

endmodule
